name: elrs_50hz
note: ELRS low-rate/range-oriented air packet anchor; channel update depends on switch mode.

name: elrs_100hz
note: ELRS full-resolution switch modes are associated with 100 Hz and 333 Hz packet-rate modes.

name: elrs_150hz
note: ELRS switch-config page lists 150 Hz among packet rates that support hybrid/wide modes.

name: elrs_250hz
note: ELRS Lua guide notes 250 Hz as the fastest packet rate usable with 400 kbaud external modules.

name: elrs_333hz
note: ELRS full-resolution switch modes are associated with 100 Hz and 333 Hz packet-rate modes.

name: elrs_500hz
note: ELRS switch-config page lists 500 Hz and F500 packet-rate modes.

name: elrs_f1000
note: ELRS F1000 is a low-latency FLRC packet-rate mode with reduced range.

name: dshot150
note: Raw one-way 16-bit frame timing; real command cadence is usually locked to FC loop/ESC telemetry scheduling.

name: dshot300
note: Raw one-way 16-bit frame timing; real command cadence is usually locked to FC loop/ESC telemetry scheduling.

name: dshot600
note: Raw one-way 16-bit frame timing; real command cadence is usually locked to FC loop/ESC telemetry scheduling.
